## Episode X, Exercise Y proposal
Complete the title above with the corresponding episode and exercise numbers.

### Brief description
Describe the main ideas and elements of the exercise you would like to propose. Please submit a new Issue for every new exercise.

### Learning objective(s)
Describe how the proposed exercise addresses the learning objective(s) below.

List the covered learning objectives via direct links to the [Wiki Page](https://github.com/carpentries-incubator/bioimage-analysis-python/wiki/Learning-Objectives).

### Volunteer(s)
Mention (by tagging) any project members (including yourself) that might be interested in participating in the development of this exercise. It's okay if you just want to propose the idea and don't want to commit to its development.
